title: What Happens If Iran War Actually Ends In 2 Weeks: The Challenges Ahead
summary_full: Trump said the war could end in two weeks sans a deal to re-open the Hormuz. Analysts say it could take six to weight weeks more for oil flows to normalise, with each extra week of fighting adding seven to 14 days of recovery.

IR.evidence: Iran War Actually Ends In 2 Weeks
